event: Allegorical portrait of an artist crowned by Fame
symbols: winged figure above — Fame or divine inspiration descending upon the artist
putto with laurel wreath — glory and recognition crowning creative endeavor
classical busts and sculpture — the enduring tradition of art reaching toward the divine
flowers at her feet — the transience of earthly beauty (vanitas)
description: A woman in a white and blue gown sits on a platform in a richly appointed studio, gesturing toward a small flower painting on an easel. Above her, a large winged female figure in flowing drapery floats, holding a golden cloth. A small winged putto descends carrying a dark laurel wreath toward the woman's head. Behind her, classical marble busts and sculptures crowd a draped table. At her feet lie grapes, flowers, and small animals. The background reveals an arched view of a distant landscape with obelisks and trees.

_meta.title: Portrait of An Artist in Her Studio
